summary_text: **Phase 2 Audit Result (critical gaps)** I audited Phase 2 spec vs runtime and tests in `/tmp/phase0-1c8023` and `~/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md` (no file edits). **Runtime/spec divergences** - High: Spec says Step 2 loads `delegation-matrix.md` and selects Tier 0-4, but runtime does heuristic `detectTier()` and recipe overrides; no `delegation-matrix.md` load path exists. [fugue-v2-spec.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md#L88) [fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L280) [recipe-loader.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs#L166) - High: Spec Step 6 states matrix dispatch, but runtime explicitly uses single-lane execution for Tier <=1 and can return single-lane recipe execution. [fugue-v2-spec.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md#L92) [fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L478) [recipe-loader.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs#L123) - High: Spec Step 7 implies review gate, but Tier <=2 path skips review entirely unless recipe forces security review. [fugue-v2-spec.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md#L93) [phase-runner.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L291) - High (workflow): Tier 2 implementation matrix allows `min_lanes: 1`; this is effectively a single-lane fallback in a phase that claims structured multi-lane gating. [fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L484) **Critical correctness risks with weak/no test coverage** - High: Retry loop can reuse stale implementation due cache key not including feedback/retry context; remediation feedback may never be applied. [phase-runner.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L251) [phase-runner.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L273) No tests target low-review retry path; current fixtures force pass score 7.
